title: spergula platensis var. balansae
intro: Spergula platensis var. balansae, also known as the Corn Spurrey, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Spergula platensis var. balansae include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat wounds, and alleviate symptoms of various diseases. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
